# atlassian_jira_permission_scheme (Resource)

Manages a Jira Cloud permission scheme.

## Example Usage

```terraform
resource "atlassian_jira_permission_scheme" "example" {
  name        = "Example Permission Scheme"
  description = "Manages project permissions"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the permission scheme.

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the permission scheme.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the permission scheme.
